company.name: Roche Holding AG (Pharma division)
company.subtitle: Pharma-only model | CHF 46.2B 2024 (+8%) | Vabysmo/Hemlibra/Phesgo/Ocrevus growth | Trontinemab AD pivotal | Excludes Diagnostics CHF 13B
company.cashRunway: Self-funding (CHF 17B+ op cash flow); Pharma division only modeled (excludes Diagnostics ~CHF 13B)

market.notes: First & only Ph3-proven for PPMS. Ocrevus Zunovo SC (2024) extends LCM. Class peers: Briumvi (TG/UCB), Kesimpta (Novartis SC ofatumumab).
First bispecific anti-VEGF/Ang2 for retina; up to q16w dosing. Class: Eylea (REGN/Bayer dominant), Beovu (Novartis), Lucentis biosim.
DME 2nd-largest Vabysmo indication. Eylea HD competing.
RVO approved 2023. Smaller indication.
DR (without DME) — earlier-stage retinopathy.
FIXa/FX bispecific replacing FVIII for prophylaxis. Subcut weekly/biweekly. Class peers: NovoEight, Adynovate (FVIII recombinant), emerging Pfizer Beqvez (gene tx), Sanofi efanesoctocog (Altuvoct).
Subcutaneous FDC of Perjeta+Herceptin replacing IV. Cannibalizes both legacy IV products. Substantial growth as SC switch accelerates.

assets.name: Perjeta (pertuzumab) — anti-HER2 mAb
assets.stage: Commercial ($4.1B 2024; declining vs Phesgo SC switch)

market.notes: Branded HER2 dimerization mAb. Cannibalized by Phesgo SC switch + biosim Herceptin.
T-DM1 ADC — DM1 maytansine payload. Adjuvant standard post residual disease. Competing with Enhertu (DXd) which is taking share in metastatic.
MMAE-vedotin ADC vs CD79b. POLARIX Ph3 1L positive (Pola-R-CHP). Class peers: Kymriah, Yescarta CAR-Ts, Columvi/Lunsumio bispecifics.
CD20xCD3 bispecific T-cell engager. R/R FL approved 2022. Combo + earlier line expansion. Class peers: Epkinly (AbbVie/Genmab).
Fixed-duration CD20xCD3 bispecific (12-cycle stop). STARGLO Ph3 positive 2L+. Class peer: Epkinly continuous.
ALK 2nd-gen TKI; 1L standard. ALINA 2024 adjuvant approval extends to early-stage. Class peers: Lorbrena (Pfizer 3rd gen), Xalkori (1st gen, generic).

indications.name: NSCLC + multiple solid tumors IO combos

market.notes: PD-L1 inhibitor; lost share to Keytruda. SC formulation 2024 extends LCM. NSCLC + UC + HCC + SCLC + TNBC + NETs.
Anti-IgE for severe asthma + food allergy (peanut+multi-food approved Feb 2024). ~70% of brand. Roche US, Novartis ROW. Biosim pressure 2027+.
CSU ~30% of brand. Class peers: Ligelizumab (Novartis), Dupixent (Sanofi).
Anti-IL-6R. Biosimilar Tyenne (Fresenius) launched 2024. Multi-indication (RA, GCA, sJIA, COVID-19, CRS post-CAR-T).

indications.name: Spinal muscular atrophy (all ages, all types)

market.notes: First oral SMN2 splice modulator. Class peers: Spinraza (Biogen ASO IT), Zolgensma (Novartis AAV9 GT).
PI3Kα-selective; INAVO120 Ph3 positive in PIK3CA-mut HR+ mBC + fulvestrant + palbociclib triplet. Class peers: Piqray (Novartis alpelisib).
Recycling C5 mAb (q4w SC). Class dominated by Soliris/Ultomiris (AZN). Crovalimab has Q4W SC dosing (vs Ultomiris Q8W IV).

indications.name: Multi-tumor IO combos (mCRC, NSCLC, ovarian, HCC, glioma)

market.notes: Anti-VEGF. Heavy biosim pressure since 2019. Tail revenue.

indications.name: NHL + CLL + RA + ANCA vasculitis (post-biosim tail)

market.notes: First anti-CD20 mAb. Biosims dominate post-2017. Tail revenue across NHL, CLL, autoimmune.
First HER2 mAb. Biosims since 2017; Phesgo cannibalizes branded share.

assets.name: Pulmozyme (dornase alfa) — recombinant DNase for CF

market.notes: Recombinant DNase nebulized for CF. Long-established (~$500M 2024) adjunct to CFTR modulators (Vertex Trikafta dominant).

Recombinant tPA. Acute hospital use. TNKase newer (now larger than Activase post-AIS). (single bolus). Generic alteplase post-LOE; TNKase still branded. Combined ~$0.6B 2024 post-biosim/generic erosion.

assets.name: Trontinemab — anti-amyloid brain-shuttle (Brainshuttle)
assets.stage: Phase 3 (initiation 2025; post Ph1b/2 strong amyloid clearance)

market.notes: Anti-Aβ mAb fused with TfR-binder (Brainshuttle) — 8x brain penetration vs Leqembi/Kisunla. Ph1b/2 dramatic amyloid clearance + low ARIA. Pivotal Ph3 starting 2025-26. Potential market leader.

assets.name: Prasinezumab — anti-alpha-synuclein mAb (PD)
assets.stage: Phase 2b PADOVA readout 2024 (mixed); Ph3 PASADENA-2 ongoing

market.notes: Anti-α-synuclein mAb (Prothena partner). PADOVA Ph2b mixed (motor benefit subgroup); Ph3 ongoing. Class peer: cinpanemab (Biogen, failed).
Intravitreal anti-IL-6 mAb. First-in-class for uveitic ME. Ph3 NEPTUNE/MERIDIAN ongoing.
Anti-ST2 mAb (IL-33 axis blocker). ASTERIA-1/2 COPD Ph3 readouts 2025-26. Class peer: itepekimab (REGN/SNY anti-IL33).
Severe asthma Ph3 program.

Oral SERD. Ph3 lidERA (adj early) + persevERA (1L met) + evERA + heredERA. Class peers: Orserdu (elacestrant Stemline/Menarini; ESR1mut), camizestrant (AZN Ph3), vepdegestrant (Pfizer/Arvinas PROTAC).

assets.name: Heritage portfolio (Esbriet + Madopar + Pegasys + NeoRecormon + others)

indications.name: Heritage tail (Esbriet IPF + Madopar PD + Pegasys HCV + NeoRecormon EPO + others)

market.notes: Esbriet (pirfenidone IPF, biosim post 2022 ~$0.3B), Madopar (PD legacy), Pegasys (HCV legacy), NeoRecormon (epoetin EPO), MIRCERA, Pulmozyme (separate), Tarceva (LOE), Cotellic, Zelboraf, Rozlytrek, Erivedge, others. Heterogeneous tail.

mega_bear.narrative: Tecentriq/Actemra biosim cliffs accelerate; Vabysmo growth slows vs Eylea HD; Trontinemab Ph3 disappoints; pipeline misses
events: X Vabysmo growth flatlines vs Eylea HD
X Tecentriq erodes faster post-Keytruda dominance
X Hemlibra growth slows vs Pfizer Beqvez gene therapy + Sanofi Altuvoct

bear.narrative: Steady Vabysmo + Hemlibra; Ocrevus modest; pipeline mixed; biosim erosion as expected
events: ~ Hemlibra holds vs gene therapy entrants

base.narrative: Vabysmo $7B peak + Hemlibra steady + Trontinemab approved + Phesgo SC switch complete + multiple pipeline wins
events: V Trontinemab approved 2028; market leader in AD anti-amyloid
V Hemlibra holds franchise; Phesgo SC switch ~85%

bull.narrative: Trontinemab $5B+ AD blockbuster + Vabysmo $9B+ + Itovebi/Giredestrant breast franchise + Astegolimab $3B+ COPD

psychedelic_bull.narrative: Multi-franchise dominance + Trontinemab $10B+ AD + Itovebi/Giredestrant $5B+ breast + Astegolimab $5B+ COPD
events: V Multiple expansion to peak premium pharma multiples

lastData.title: Pharma-only model. FY2024 CHF 46.2B (+8% CER). 9M 2025 +7% CER. Vabysmo/Hemlibra/Phesgo/Ocrevus driving growth offsetting Tecentriq/Actemra biosim erosion. Trontinemab Ph3 pivotal AD opportunity.
points: Top 4 growth drivers (Vabysmo + Phesgo + Ocrevus + Hemlibra) = CHF 16.9B (+CHF 3.3B vs 2023)
Phesgo CHF 1.7B (+62%); HER2+ SC switch from Perjeta
Itovebi (inavolisib) approved Oct 2024 PI3Kα HR+ breast
Trontinemab Ph2 dramatic amyloid clearance; Ph3 starting 2025-26

nextCatalyst.title: Astegolimab COPD Ph3 + Giredestrant lidERA Ph3 + Trontinemab Ph2 follow-up
thresholds: H1 2026: Astegolimab ASTERIA-1/2 COPD Ph3 readouts
H2 2026: Giredestrant lidERA + persevERA Ph3 readouts (oral SERD)
Q4 2026: Trontinemab Ph2/3 follow-up readout (anti-Aβ Brainshuttle)
2027: Vamikibart uveitis Ph3 + Prasinezumab PD Ph3

risks: Tecentriq biosim erosion accelerating; lost share to Keytruda
Hemlibra competition from Pfizer Beqvez (gene therapy) + Sanofi Altuvoct (efanesoctocog)
Vabysmo competition from Eylea HD (Regeneron Q12-16w)
Currency: CHF strength vs USD/EUR/JPY pressures reported sales

catalysts.title: Trontinemab Ph2/3 follow-up readout (anti-Aβ Brainshuttle)
catalysts._rationale: Transformational potential vs Leqembi/Kisunla; 8x brain penetration.

catalysts.title: Astegolimab ASTERIA-1/2 COPD Ph3 readouts
catalysts._rationale: First anti-ST2 in COPD; class peer Itepekimab Ph3 ongoing.

catalysts.title: Giredestrant lidERA + persevERA Ph3 readouts (oral SERD)
catalysts._rationale: ER+ breast oral SERD class race vs camizestrant/elacestrant.

catalysts.title: Vamikibart NEPTUNE/MERIDIAN Ph3 readout (uveitis ME)
catalysts._rationale: First IVT anti-IL-6 for uveitic ME.
